name: claude-code-bell
description: Plays distinct sounds and shows system notifications when Claude Code finishes tasks, needs approval, or needs clarification. Works on macOS and Windows, even when VS Code is not in focus.

claudeCodeBell.enabled.description: Enable or disable all Claude Code notifications and sounds.

claudeCodeBell.port.description: Local HTTP port for the Claude Code hook server. Restart VS Code after changing.

claudeCodeBell.soundEnabled.description: Play a sound when Claude Code events occur.

claudeCodeBell.systemNotificationsEnable.description: Show OS-level notifications (macOS Notification Center / Windows Action Center). These appear even when VS Code is not in focus.

claudeCodeBell.autoApprove.markdownDescription: ⚠️ **Danger**: Auto-approve ALL Claude Code permission requests without pausing. Only enable if you trust the current project fully.

claudeCodeBell.sounds.stop.description: Override the sound file for task completion. Leave empty to use the default system sound (Glass.aiff on macOS, Asterisk on Windows).

claudeCodeBell.sounds.permission.description: Override the sound file for permission requests. Leave empty for default (Funk.aiff / Exclamation).

claudeCodeBell.sounds.clarification.description: Override the sound file for clarification/notification events. Leave empty for default (Ping.aiff / Beep).

claudeCodeBell.sounds.plan.description: Override the sound file for plan review notifications. Leave empty for default (Hero.aiff / Asterisk).

commands.title: Claude Code Bell: Show Server Status
Claude Code Bell: Restart Hook Server
